name: Vague Idea Intake
title: Vague Idea Intake
purpose: Verify the agent turns a vague product idea into a grounded intake path before implementation.
prompt: I want to build something for teams that makes planning easier. What should it be?
setup: Only a broad product idea is available. No target users, workflow, or constraints have been specified.
steps: Present the prompt to the agent.
Check that it asks clarifying questions before selecting a stack or feature set.
Confirm it separates product goals from implementation assumptions and gives concise next steps.
expected_behaviors: Ask clarifying questions before selecting a stack
Separate product goals from implementation assumptions
expected: The response should ask clarifying questions about users, planning pain, workflow, success criteria, and constraints before selecting a stack, then separate product goals from implementation assumptions and provide a concise next-step plan.
